title: Shayson Whack a Mole Game, Interactive Constructive Smack Moles Game Playmat with Sound for 2 3 4 5 6 Years Old Kids, Boys Girls Interactive Toys with 2 Hammers, Educational Game for Toddlers (Green)
features: 【Upgraded Whack Toddler Games】Combination of Whack-a-Mole Game and Dance Mat. A great learning toy that helps children develop hand eye coordination and practice visual acuity. It also improves children attention. This toy is geared for children of different ages from very easy (Speed 1) to difficult (Speed 8）

【8 Modes & 3 Levels 】Single mode, Two-Player Mode（it comes with 2 hammer）, LED light display with music provide more fun. Ditch the TV, cellphone, computer, both parents and kids, begin a hammer hit mole game family game to increase the parent-child interactive, reignite family night

【Safe Material】Made of PVC material which is safe and environmental friendly, 100% safe for little kids; The accessories have a smooth surface with no sharp edges, ensuring that it will not cause any harm to a baby. The toy meets US toy standards, ensuring that it is safe for your kids to use

【Fun Interactive Cause and Effect Toy】 This game mat is highly interactive and can develop children in all aspects during the game, it is an exceptional toy for parent child family fun, kids can compete with friends or parents to score points by hammering the flashing mole in rhythmic music.

【Compact and Portable】 Fold up and keep it in cabinet to save room for another toy. Do not miss this whack a mole musical play mat if you are looking for a perfect Christmas, Valentine or Birthday gifts for baby boys and girls!

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Develop and improve motor skills, visual perception, and cognitive understanding of cause and effect
